headline: Notable Insider Buys This Past Week: Keurig, Change Healthcare And More
summary:
Insider buying can be an encouraging signal for potential investors.
	A CEO took advantage of a secondary offering last week.
	A CFO also stepped up to the buy window.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Amazon, Netflix, Starbucks And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	This week's bullish calls included the iPhone maker and the king of e-commerce.
	A coronavirus play and the electric vehicle leader were among the bearish calls.

headline: Cannabis Experts Say Elon Musk's Outspoken Support Is Helpful, But Additional Action Is Needed
summary: Can a prominent person create change with a statement alone? To an extent, it appears so, though experts say more is required to move the needle when creating change.
